tasks.title: ## Task: Cache successful Temporal owner guard validations (TDD)
tasks.summary: Added a store-lifetime WeakMap owner guard cache keyed by `TemporalStoreBackendInput`, caching only successful owner-bearing validations. `getGuardedChangeHandle` now skips repeated legacy disk reads for the same validated change while still returning fresh workflow handles. Ownerless changes, mismatches, and read failures remain uncached. Added focused tests for cache hit, ownerless no-cache, mismatch no-cache, per-input isolation, and read failure no-cache. RED failed on cache-count expectations; GREEN passed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added a store-lifetime WeakMap owner guard cache keyed by `TemporalStoreBackendInput`, caching only successful owner-bearing validations. `getGuardedChangeHandle` now skips repeated legacy disk reads for the same validated change while still returning fresh workflow handles. Ownerless changes, mismatches, and read failures remain uncached. Added focused tests for cache hit, ownerless no-cache, mismatch no-cache, per-input isolation, and read failure no-cache. RED failed on cache-count expectations; GREEN passed.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed: identified current N× guard-read path in `store-temporal/shared.ts` and repeated guarded calls in tasks/changes. Old store-locks path absent but issue survives in Temporal owner guard.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by adv-researcher: VALIDATED. WeakMap keyed by TemporalStoreBackendInput is safe because adv_project_id and input.projectId are immutable for store lifetime. Ownerless and mismatch cases remain uncached.
